title: Identity docs, heartbeat, clickable changelog
changes: New: per-agent agent.md / soul.md / brand.md. Three optional markdown blocks injected into every run/chat to define the agent's role, personality, and brand voice.
New: heartbeat indicator — a tiny green dot that beats on every agent card and desk, so you can see at a glance that the hub is alive.
New: click the version label at the bottom of the sidebar to see a quick changelog of what's new.
Fix: CEO card no longer shows Delete / Edit / Skills / Schedule buttons (mirrors the COO's action set). Backend was already blocking deletion.

title: CEO agent, per-agent MCP + webhooks, office redesign
changes: New: CEO agent (permanent, above the COO). Gets its own gold office in the Office view.
New: per-agent MCP servers with a master on/off toggle and per-server enable switch. Supports stdio / http / sse transports.
New: per-agent custom webhooks & API endpoints — agent can pull data from any REST API you configure (e.g. Shopify stock, Stripe balance).
New: per-agent emoji. Shows on cards, desks, chat header, and messages. Bounces while the agent is running.
New: per-agent agent.md / soul.md / brand.md — inject role, personality, and brand voice into every run or chat.
New: Heartbeat indicator — a tiny beating dot on each agent card so you can tell at a glance that the hub is alive.
UI: Office redesigned as a "building" with CEO Office, COO Office, and a cubicles floor for worker agents.
UI: Board dropdown now has a Rename option so the default board can be renamed from the header.
UI: Version label is now clickable — tap it for a quick changelog.
Fix: eliminated the double chat bubble that appeared while an agent was responding.

title: Claude Editor integration
changes: Added Claude Editor to local hub discovery (port 12795).
Agents now see Claude Editor as a connected hub when it's running on the same Mac.
